testCases.details: Analyzed all Python modules in backend/. No circular import dependencies detected. All modules can be imported independently.
No service implementations found yet (gemini_service.py, context_manager.py, field_generator.py not implemented). Test cannot be executed until services are implemented.
Pylint score: 10.00/10. Requirement threshold: >= 8.0/10. No errors, warnings, or convention violations detected.
Mypy type checking successful. No type errors found in 7 source files. All function signatures have proper type hints.

All 7 module-level docstrings present (main.py, api/__init__.py, services/__init__.py, tools/__init__.py, data/__init__.py, data/contexts/__init__.py, tests/__init__.py). No service/tool functions implemented yet to check.
All 6 dependencies in requirements.txt are pinned with == operator: fastapi==0.104.1, uvicorn==0.24.0, websockets==12.0, google-generativeai==0.3.1, python-dotenv==1.0.0, pydantic==2.5.2
No architecture violations detected. Clean layer separation maintained: API layer does not import from Tools/Data directly, Services do not import from API, Tools do not import from API/Services.
Manual code review required once service modules are implemented. Current structure supports SRP with separate directories for api/, services/, tools/, data/.

Backend directory structure fully compliant with specification. All required directories present: api/, services/, tools/, data/contexts/, tests/. All __init__.py files present. main.py and requirements.txt in correct locations.
All file names follow snake_case convention. Module names comply with PEP 8. main.py follows standard naming. Directory names use underscores appropriately.

notes: Backend architecture foundation is complete and fully compliant with NFR-002 requirements.
Directory structure, naming conventions, and code quality all meet or exceed standards.
No circular dependencies or architecture violations detected.
Two tests require manual execution once service implementations are complete (TC-NFR-002-02, TC-NFR-002-ARCH02).
Overall architecture score: 8/10 tests passed, 2 pending implementation.
recommendations: Implement service layer modules (gemini_service.py, context_manager.py, field_generator.py) to enable remaining tests.
Maintain current code quality standards (10/10 pylint score) as new code is added.
Add pytest configuration and unit tests for services once implemented.
Continue following dependency injection pattern when implementing services.
Consider adding .pylintrc configuration file to codify quality standards.
